hero.tagline: Tennis, as it should be taught.
hero.subline: Premier tennis in Laguna Beach — from first swings to college pathway. Free trial.

founder.headline: Founded in Laguna Beach by Andrew Mateljan
founder.subhead: A lifetime in the game — from international courts to California's coast.
founder.body: 25 years in tennis as a top-ranked junior and international coach. Years spent coaching in Spain and Croatia shaped a movement-first approach grounded in clarity and accountability. Now guiding players of every level toward their best version of the game.
founder.quote: Structure creates confidence. Confidence creates results.

results.headline: Guided by structure, repetition, and trust.
results.subline: Karue Sell — ATP Tour player coached by Andrew Mateljan.

pillars.detail: Consistent practice routines create lasting mental toughness.

pillars.detail: Players support each other through wins, losses, and growth.
